signals.npcLine: Markets jittery; shadows trading cheap nodes in silence.
signals.questPulse: Scan for ghost coins slipping under market radars.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptoverse sees slight rise; whispers of hidden hands.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual uptick in unknown tokens sparks street buzz.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips traders; some dump assets to escape collapse.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate cyber exchanges to sow confusion or gather intel.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment hits cold fear; nodes flicker erratically.
signals.clueEvent: Analytics show slow creep of panic through net markets.

signals.npcLine: Grass rising in the dirt—new coin sprouts gaining traction.
signals.questPulse: Harvest unclaimed tokens before rival clans secure them.
signals.worldFeed: Underdog cryptos quietly gain score in dark corners.
signals.clueEvent: Signals reveal small but steady growth from fringe assets.

signals.npcLine: Chip tokens flicker; rumored to embed secret blueprints.
signals.questPulse: Retrieve encrypted chips from rival netrovers before shutdown.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers claim hidden data within chip tokens' code.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted token transfers spike under moonlight scans.

signals.npcLine: Pengu clans shuffle assets; icy trade flows spark fights.
signals.questPulse: Broker a truce by securing rare water nodes.
signals.worldFeed: Pengu factions move under radar, tension builds on ice.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at brewing asset skirmishes.
